paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jehovah spake unto Moses, saying,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying, If any one shall sin unwittingly, in any of the things which Jehovah hath commanded not to be done, and shall do any one of them:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: if the anointed priest shall sin so as to bring guilt on the people, then let him offer for his sin, which he hath sinned, a young bullock without blemish unto Jehovah for a sin-offering.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall bring the bullock unto the door of the tent of meeting before Jehovah; and he shall lay his hand upon the head of the bullock, and kill the bullock before Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the anointed priest shall take of the blood of the bullock, and bring it to the tent of meeting:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and the priest shall dip his finger in the blood, and sprinkle of the blood seven times before Jehovah, before the veil of the sanctuary.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the priest shall put of the blood upon the horns of the altar of sweet incense before Jehovah, which is in the tent of meeting; and all the blood of the bullock shall he pour out at the base of the altar of burnt-offering, which is at the door of the tent of meeting.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And all the fat of the bullock of the sin-offering he shall take off from it; the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the loins, and the caul upon the liver, with the kidneys, shall he take away,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: as it is taken off from the ox of the sacrifice of peace-offerings: and the priest shall burn them upon the altar of burnt-offering.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the skin of the bullock, and all its flesh, with its head, and with its legs, and its inwards, and its dung,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: even the whole bullock shall he carry forth without the camp unto a clean place, where the ashes are poured out, and burn it on wood with fire: where the ashes are poured out shall it be burnt.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And if the whole congregation of Israel err, and the thing be hid from the eyes of the assembly, and they have done any of the things which Jehovah hath commanded not to be done, and are guilty;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: when the sin wherein they have sinned is known, then the assembly shall offer a young bullock for a sin-offering, and bring it before the tent of meeting.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the elders of the congregation shall lay their hands upon the head of the bullock before Jehovah; and the bullock shall be killed before Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the anointed priest shall bring of the blood of the bullock to the tent of meeting:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and the priest shall dip his finger in the blood, and sprinkle it seven times before Jehovah, before the veil.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall put of the blood upon the horns of the altar which is before Jehovah, that is in the tent of meeting; and all the blood shall he pour out at the base of the altar of burnt-offering, which is at the door of the tent of meeting.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And all the fat thereof shall he take off from it, and burn it upon the altar.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thus shall he do with the bullock; as he did with the bullock of the sin-offering, so shall he do with this; and the priest shall make atonement for them, and they shall be forgiven.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall carry forth the bullock without the camp, and burn it as he burned the first bullock: it is the sin-offering for the assembly.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: When a ruler sinneth, and doeth unwittingly any one of all the things which Jehovah his God hath commanded not to be done, and is guilty;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: if his sin, wherein he hath sinned, be made known to him, he shall bring for his oblation a goat, a male without blemish.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the goat, and kill it in the place where they kill the burnt-offering before Jehovah: it is a sin-offering.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the priest shall take of the blood of the sin-offering with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt-offering; and the blood thereof shall he pour out at the base of the altar of burnt-offering.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And all the fat thereof shall he burn upon the altar, as the fat of the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall make atonement for him as concerning his sin, and he shall be forgiven.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And if any one of the common people sin unwittingly, in doing any of the things which Jehovah hath commanded not to be done, and be guilty;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: if his sin, which he hath sinned, be made known to him, then he shall bring for his oblation a goat, a female without blemish, for his sin which he hath sinned.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the sin-offering, and kill the sin-offering in the place of burnt-offering.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the priest shall take of the blood thereof with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt-offering; and all the blood thereof shall he pour out at the base of the altar.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And all the fat thereof shall he take away, as the fat is taken away from off the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall burn it upon the altar for a sweet savor unto Jehovah; and the priest shall make atonement for him, and he shall be forgiven.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And if he bring a lamb as his oblation for a sin-offering, he shall bring it a female without blemish.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the sin-offering, and kill it for a sin-offering in the place where they kill the burnt-offering.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the priest shall take of the blood of the sin-offering with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt-offering; and all the blood thereof shall he pour out at the base of the altar:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and all the fat thereof shall he take away, as the fat of the lamb is taken away from the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall burn them on the altar, upon the offerings of Jehovah made by fire; and the priest shall make atonement for him as touching his sin that he hath sinned, and he shall be forgiven.
